name: Magnecube
developer: Alejandro Ibrahim Ojea, Alana Cristina Fernández Basquero
short_description: A 2D puzzle game where you control a magnetic cube navigating levels filled with obstacles and unique mechanics. Includes on-line level editor.
detailed_description:
🧲 Magnecube

Magnecube is a 2D puzzle game where you control a magnetic cube that must navigate levels full of obstacles and unique mechanics. With a built-in level editor, you can create and share your own challenges with the community.

🔍 Key Features

  • Challenging levels: each one designed to test your wits.

  • 20+ innovative mechanics: from magnets to moving platforms, each level introduces new elements.

  • Colorful pixel-art style: a retro aesthetic that complements the gameplay.

  • Level editor: create, share, and play levels made by other players.

  • Story mode and online multiplayer: explore levels made by the developer or play ones designed by the community.

  • Steam Inventory integration: earn items through drops to equip your character or trade them on the Steam Market.

💡 Why play Magnecube?

If you enjoy logic and platformer games with a unique twist, Magnecube offers an immersive and creative experience. Its magnet-based mechanics and level design will keep you entertained for hours. And with the drop system and customizable items, the fun continues even outside the game!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, French, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese
